title: "Sync Calendar" option doesn't appear on Date Columns

posts.author: AnderTran (Mike Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Greetings!

I’ve seen plenty of videos demonstrating how to have your Due Dates or any Date column, automatically update your external calendar (Outlook in my case).

However, when I click on the column cell to make the calendar box appear, there is no option on the bottom that says “Sync Calendar” like the video demonstrates.

Is there something I am missing?

Thanks for your help on this!

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
@AnderTran welcome to the monday.com community and extension of the monday.com family.

Are you using a browser like Chrome? Can you send me what you see from your end?

It should look like this:
